welcome_message: Welcome to our Fusion Family. Please complete the following steps to get access to the full community.
location_message: Where do you live? Select one option below.
contact_intro_message:
Before we continue, we need your contact details so our team can reach you if anything in your trading platform settings is incorrect.

Your Telegram ID: `{telegram_id}`
Your Telegram username: {telegram_username}

If these look wrong, update them in Telegram settings first, then continue.
contact_email_prompt: Please reply with your *email address* in your next message.
contact_phone_prompt: Thank you. Now please reply with your *phone number* (include country code, e.g. +31...).
contact_platform_user_id_prompt: Thank you. Now please reply with your *{platform} platform user ID* (the username or account ID you use on that trading platform).
contact_saved_message: Contact details saved. Tap *Continue* to proceed.
checklist_intro: Please go through the document, follow the steps, and fill in the checklist below when you are done.

checklist_items.title: Go through the doc and follow the steps
Set the correct settings in your account
Deposit at least $100 in your account

confirmation_warning_message:
Have you gone through the whole document and set everything up correctly?

If you did not, this can have a negative affect on your trading experience.
screenshot_request_message:
Please submit a screenshot showing you have linked your account to us.

We will manually check your screenshot and give you access to the rest of the community when we approve.
pending_review_message:
Thank you — we received your screenshot.

Our team is reviewing it now. You will be given access within 24h. You will receive a notification when access has been granted.
approved_message: You are approved. Welcome to Fusion Strategy. You now have access to the full community. Click the link below.
idle_after_complete_message: You're all set — onboarding is complete. You have full access to the Fusion Strategy community.
completion_message: You are approved. Welcome to Fusion Strategy — you now have access to the full community.
